'''鈭歴h-w-m''' ('''shawama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quelch|quelch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-w-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quelch|quelch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-w-m
|-
! Lemma
| shawama
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shawamithi|shawamithi]] || [[word:shawamiji|shawamiji]] || [[word:shawamishi|shawamishi]] || [[word:shawami|shawami]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shawamuthuth|shawamuthuth]] || [[word:shawamujuj|shawamujuj]] || [[word:shawamushush|shawamushush]] || [[word:shawam|shawam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shawamuthu|shawamuthu]] || [[word:shawamuju|shawamuju]] || [[word:shawamushu|shawamushu]] || [[word:shawamu|shawamu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shawamufuth|shawamufuth]] || [[word:shawamufuj|shawamufuj]] || [[word:shawamufush|shawamufush]] || [[word:shawamuf|shawamuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shawamethe|shawamethe]] || [[word:shawameje|shawameje]] || [[word:shawameshe|shawameshe]] || [[word:shawame|shawame]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shawamothoth|shawamothoth]] || [[word:shawamojoj|shawamojoj]] || [[word:shawamoshosh|shawamoshosh]] || [[word:shawam|shawam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shawamotho|shawamotho]] || [[word:shawamojo|shawamojo]] || [[word:shawamosho|shawamosho]] || [[word:shawamo|shawamo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shawamofoth|shawamofoth]] || [[word:shawamofoj|shawamofoj]] || [[word:shawamofosh|shawamofosh]] || [[word:shawamof|shawamof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shawam忙th忙|shawam忙th忙]] || [[word:shawam忙j忙|shawam忙j忙]] || [[word:shawam忙sh忙|shawam忙sh忙]] || [[word:shawam忙|shawam忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shawamathath|shawamathath]] || [[word:shawamajaj|shawamajaj]] || [[word:shawamashash|shawamashash]] || [[word:shawam|shawam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shawamatha|shawamatha]] || [[word:shawamaja|shawamaja]] || [[word:shawamasha|shawamasha]] || [[word:shawama|shawama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shawamafath|shawamafath]] || [[word:shawamafaj|shawamafaj]] || [[word:shawamafash|shawamafash]] || [[word:shawamaf|shawamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:shawamasha|shawamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawamasha|goshawamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawamasha|gokishawamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:shawamn眉sha|shawamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawamnkn眉sha|goshawamnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawamn眉sha|gokishawamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawamsh毛sha|shawamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawamnksh毛sha|goshawamnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawamsh毛sha|gokishawamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawamrosha|shawamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawamnkrosha|goshawamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawamrosha|gokishawamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawamusha|shawamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawamnkmusha|goshawamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawamusha|gokishawamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawamsherasha|shawamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawamnksherasha|goshawamnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawamsherasha|gokishawamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawamngasha|shawamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawamnkngasha|goshawamnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawamngasha|gokishawamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawamyasha|shawamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawamnkyasha|goshawamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawamyasha|gokishawamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawamyamasha|shawamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawamnkyamasha|goshawamnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawamyamasha|gokishawamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawamn眉sh毛sha|shawamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawamnkn眉sh毛sha|goshawamnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawamn眉sh毛sha|gokishawamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawamn眉rosha|shawamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawamnkn眉rosha|goshawamnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawamn眉rosha|gokishawamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawamn眉musha|shawamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawamnkn眉musha|goshawamnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawamn眉musha|gokishawamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawamsh毛n眉sha|shawamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawamnksh毛n眉sha|goshawamnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawamsh毛n眉sha|gokishawamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawamsh毛rosha|shawamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawamnksh毛rosha|goshawamnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawamsh毛rosha|gokishawamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawamsh毛musha|shawamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawamnksh毛musha|goshawamnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawamsh毛musha|gokishawamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawamron眉sha|shawamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawamnkron眉sha|goshawamnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawamron眉sha|gokishawamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawamrosh毛sha|shawamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawamnkrosh毛sha|goshawamnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawamrosh毛sha|gokishawamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawamromusha|shawamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawamnkromusha|goshawamnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawamromusha|gokishawamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawamun眉sha|shawamun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawamnkmun眉sha|goshawamnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawamun眉sha|gokishawamun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawamush毛sha|shawamush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawamnkmush毛sha|goshawamnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawamush毛sha|gokishawamush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawamurosha|shawamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawamnkmurosha|goshawamnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawamurosha|gokishawamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:shawam|shawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:sh忙w忙m|sh忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoshawam|hoshawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hosh忙w忙m|hosh忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoshawam|hohoshawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohosh忙w忙m|hohosh忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉shawam|n眉shawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉sh忙w忙m|n眉sh忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉shawam|n眉n眉shawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉sh忙w忙m|n眉n眉sh忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂shawam|n茂shawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂sh忙w忙m|n茂sh忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂shawam|n茂n茂shawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂sh忙w忙m|n茂n茂sh忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lushawam|lushawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lush忙w忙m|lush忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulushawam|lulushawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulush忙w忙m|lulush忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lishawam|lishawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lish忙w忙m|lish忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilishawam|lilishawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilish忙w忙m|lilish忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koshawam|koshawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kosh忙w忙m|kosh忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoshawam|kokoshawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokosh忙w忙m|kokosh忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keshawam|keshawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kesh忙w忙m|kesh忙w忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeshawam|kekeshawam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekesh忙w忙m|kekesh忙w忙m]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
